race.description: Bet365 Bet Boost Fillies & Mares 0-56 Hcp
race.comment: NEW YORK SCANDAL (3) drifted back then made late ground to finish fourth when first up from a spell last start over 1200m at Cranbourne. Generally runs well second-up and will appreciate the drop in grade. SYMPHONITE (5) made progress last time out, finishing 2.25 lengths from the winner in third at the end of 1312m at Geelong after being in the firing line on the bend. This is a nice progression. BREAK THE TABOO (1) has been a model of consistency this preparation, putting together three runs that would be competitive here. Just needs to overcome the wide gate to be a force again. VORES (6) ran a nice race in 0-62 grade last time out, so back in grade here and should have come on fitness-wise. MISS REMSKI (9) handy enough return in similar race to this. Hasn't drawn as well here, but is fitter and much better suited by the step up to 1300m.
